metadata.title: Find Your Life Partner
metadata.description: Find your life partner on Smart Shaadi — KYC-verified profiles, Vedic Guna Milan compatibility, and a premium, privacy-first matchmaking experience trusted by Indian families.

hero.heading: Find the right partner. Not just another profile.
hero.subtext: India's first matrimonial platform built around real compatibility — Guna Milan, family values, and reciprocal matching. Verified profiles only.
hero.microcopy: Free to join · No credit card · 2 min setup
hero.photoAlt: Bride and groom in traditional wedding attire at a palace celebration
hero.phoneCardAlt: Preview of a Smart Shaadi match profile showing 92% compatibility and a Guna Milan score of 32 out of 36

howItWorks.sectionHeading: Three steps to your wedding journey
howItWorks.subhead: Designed for both individuals and families. Start together, find together.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Set up in 2 minutes. Aadhaar-verified identity, horoscope details, family background, and lifestyle preferences — all with full privacy control. Family members can co-create.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI analyses Guna Milan scores, lifestyle alignment, and family values. Reciprocal matching means both sides must show interest before contact details unlock — no awkward one-sided reveals.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Once connected, move seamlessly to the wedding journey: vendor discovery, budget tracking, guest list, and RSVP — all in one platform built for Indian families.

pricing.subtext: No credit card. No auto-charges. Cancel anytime.

cta.heading: Begin your forever.
cta.body: Join the community of verified Indian families. Free to join, private by default, family-first by design.
cta.microcopy: Free to join · Verified profiles · Privacy guaranteed

footer.description: India's smartest matrimonial platform, built on real compatibility, family values, and trust.
footer.quote: A new beginning of two families, a lifetime of love and trust.
footer.trustMadeIn: Made in India, for Indian families

trust.individualsHeading: Your Privacy. Your Timeline. Your Choice.
trust.individualsBody: You control everything. Photos stay blurred until you choose to reveal them. Contact details unlock only after mutual interest. Block anyone with one tap.
individualsPoints: Safety Mode — photos hidden until you choose
Silent decline — they'll never know you passed
trust.familiesHeading: A Platform Built for How Families Actually Work.
trust.familiesBody: Indian matrimony has always been a family decision. Smart Shaadi is built for that reality. Parents co-browse profiles. Both families verify each other. Trust is built before any meeting.

meta.title: About Us — Smart Shaadi
meta.description: Smart Shaadi is a compatibility-first, family-inclusive matrimonial platform: verified profiles, 8-factor Vedic Guna Milan, and reciprocal matching.

about.pageTitle: Matrimony built on compatibility, not catalogues.
about.intro: Smart Shaadi is a matrimonial platform for Indian families — built around real compatibility, family participation, and privacy by default.

sections.heading: Why we exist
body: Finding a life partner in India is a family decision, but most apps treat it like swiping through a catalogue. Smart Shaadi is built for how Indian families actually decide: compatibility both families can read, verification both families can trust, and privacy for the individuals at the centre of it.

sections.heading: Compatibility you can inspect
body: Every match includes a full 8-factor Vedic Guna Milan (Ashtakoot) breakdown — real deterministic calculations with Mangal Dosha detection, not a black-box percentage. AI explains the score in plain language so both families understand the why, not just the number.

sections.heading: Reciprocal by design
body: No one-sided reveals. Photos, contact details, and full profiles unlock only when both sides show genuine interest. Declines are silent. Family members can co-review matches without awkwardness.

sections.heading: Verified and safe
body: Profiles go through identity verification before they can connect. Safety Mode keeps photos hidden until you choose. Blocking is one tap, and our support team is human.

sections.heading: From match to mandap
body: Smart Shaadi carries the journey past the match: wedding planning, verified vendors with escrow-protected payments, guest lists, and RSVP — one platform from first hello to the wedding day.

about.contact: Questions or feedback? Write to us at

verification.a: Every profile goes through phone OTP, KYC (when available), and admin review before appearing in match search.

matching.a: We use 8 Ashtakoot factors (Guna Milan), demographic alignment, lifestyle compatibility, and partner preferences. Both sides must meet each other's criteria.

privacy.a: Only matches that mutually accept can see contact details. Photos stay private until both sides show interest.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — Smart Shaadi
meta.description: How Smart Shaadi collects, uses, and protects your personal data, aligned with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP).

privacy.disclaimerBody: This document is a placeholder drafted to align with the DPDP Act, 2023. It must be reviewed and finalised by qualified legal counsel (and translated for Hindi readers) before public launch.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are
body: Smart Shaadi ("we", "us", "the Platform") is a marriage-centric matchmaking and wedding-services platform operated in India. For the purposes of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 ("DPDP Act"), we act as the Data Fiduciary for the personal data you provide.
Data Fiduciary: Smart Shaadi (legal entity name and registered address to be inserted before launch).

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
body: Account & profile data: name, date of birth, gender, phone number, email, community, location, photos, lifestyle and family details you choose to add to your profile.
Verification status only: when you complete KYC we store the verification result and a reference token. We do NOT store your raw Aadhaar number, full KYC documents, or biometric data.
Usage data: matches viewed, shortlists, chat metadata, device and log information used to operate and secure the service.
Payment data: handled by our payment processor (Razorpay). We store transaction status and references, not full card numbers.

sections.heading: 3. Why we use your data (purpose)
body: To create and operate your account, surface reciprocal matches, enable chat and contact sharing, process bookings and payments, run safety and fraud checks, and meet legal obligations.
Contact details (phone, email) are masked by default and are only revealed to another member after you explicitly unlock contact sharing for that specific match.

sections.heading: 4. Consent and how to withdraw it
body: We process your personal data on the basis of the consent you give when you register and when you enable specific features (e.g. KYC, contact sharing).

You may withdraw consent at any time from your account settings or by contacting our Grievance Officer. Withdrawing consent may limit or end your ability to use parts of the Platform. Withdrawal does not affect processing already carried out lawfully.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights as a Data Principal
body: Under the DPDP Act you have the right to: access a summary of your personal data and how it is processed; request correction or completion of inaccurate or incomplete data; request erasure of your data where it is no longer needed; nominate another individual to exercise your rights in the event of death or incapacity; and raise a grievance.
To exercise any of these rights, contact our Grievance Officer (below). We will respond within the timelines required by law.

sections.heading: 6. Grievance redressal
body: Grievance Officer: (name to be inserted before launch).
Email: grievance@smartshaadi.co.in.
If you are not satisfied with our response, you may approach the Data Protection Board of India.

sections.heading: 7. Third-party processors
body: We share the minimum data necessary with trusted processors who act on our instructions: Razorpay (payments), MSG91 (OTP and SMS), DigiLocker (identity verification), Cloudflare R2 (media storage), and AWS SES (email).
Each processor is bound to use your data only to provide their service to us.

sections.heading: 8. Data retention
body: We keep your personal data only as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service and meet legal, tax, and dispute-resolution obligations. When data is no longer required, we delete or anonymise it.

sections.heading: 9. Security
body: We use industry-standard safeguards including encryption in transit, access controls, masked contact details, and stored verification status rather than raw identity documents. No system is perfectly secure, and we encourage you to protect your account credentials.

sections.heading: 10. Children
body: The Platform is intended only for individuals aged 18 and above. We do not knowingly create profiles for minors.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to this policy
body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be notified through the Platform. The "Last updated" date above reflects the latest revision.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
body: Questions about this policy: privacy@smartshaadi.co.in.

meta.title: Terms of Service — Smart Shaadi
meta.description: The terms governing your use of the Smart Shaadi matchmaking and wedding-services platform.

terms.disclaimerBody: This document is a placeholder. It must be reviewed and finalised by qualified legal counsel (and translated for Hindi readers) before public launch.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of these terms
body: By creating an account or using Smart Shaadi (the "Platform") you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility
body: You must be at least 18 years old and legally permitted to marry under applicable Indian law to use the Platform. By using it you confirm that the information you provide is true and that you are using the service for genuine matrimonial purposes.

sections.heading: 3. Your account and authentication
body: Accounts are secured by phone-based OTP authentication. You are responsible for activity under your account and for keeping your device and credentials secure. Notify us immediately of any unauthorised use.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable use
body: You agree not to: misrepresent your identity, marital status, or intentions; harass, abuse, or solicit other members; post unlawful, obscene, or fraudulent content; scrape or harvest data; or use the Platform for any purpose other than genuine matchmaking and wedding planning.
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or our community standards.

sections.heading: 5. Matchmaking — no guarantee
body: The Platform provides tools, compatibility scores (including Guna Milan), and AI-assisted recommendations to help you find a match. We do not guarantee a marriage, a match, or the accuracy of any member-provided information. Decisions about whom you meet or marry are entirely your own, and you should exercise your own judgement and due diligence.

sections.heading: 6. Payments, subscriptions, and refunds
body: Paid plans and bookings are processed through our payment partner, Razorpay. Subscription pricing and renewal terms are shown at the point of purchase.
Vendor bookings may use an escrow mechanism; funds are released or refunded according to the booking and dispute terms presented at checkout. Refund eligibility is governed by our Refund Policy.

sections.heading: 7. Vendors and third-party services
body: Vendors listed on the Platform are independent third parties. We facilitate discovery and booking but are not a party to the contract between you and a vendor and are not liable for the quality or delivery of vendor services.

sections.heading: 8. Intellectual property
body: The Platform, its software, branding, and content (other than your own user content) are owned by Smart Shaadi or its licensors. You retain rights to content you upload but grant us a licence to host and display it for the purpose of operating the service.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of liability
body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Smart Shaadi is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, or for the conduct of other members or vendors. The Platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.

sections.heading: 10. Termination
body: You may close your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate access for breach of these terms, for legal reasons, or to protect members. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination will continue to apply.

sections.heading: 11. Governing law and disputes
body: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at the seat to be specified before launch.

sections.heading: 12. Changes to these terms
body: We may revise these terms from time to time. Material changes will be notified through the Platform. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 13. Contact
body: Questions about these terms: support@smartshaadi.co.in.

meta.title: Refund Policy — Smart Shaadi
meta.description: Refund terms for Smart Shaadi subscription payments: 7-day refund window, how to request a refund, and processing timelines.

refundPolicy.disclaimerBody: This document is a starter draft and not legal advice. It must be reviewed and finalised by qualified legal counsel before public launch.

sections.heading: 1. What this policy covers
body: This policy applies to payments made to Smart Shaadi for subscription plans (such as Smart Shaadi Premium) processed through our payment partner, Razorpay. Vendor bookings, escrow payments, and rental bookings are governed by their own booking terms and the platform's dispute-resolution process.

sections.heading: 2. 7-day refund window
body: If you are not satisfied with a paid subscription, you may request a full refund within 7 days of the first payment for that subscription term. Refund requests made after the 7-day window are not eligible, except where required by applicable law.

sections.heading: 3. How to request a refund
body: Email support@smartshaadi.co.in from the email address or phone number registered to your account, with the payment reference (order or invoice ID). We may ask you to verify account ownership before processing.

sections.heading: 4. Processing and timelines
body: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method through Razorpay. Refunds are typically initiated within 5–7 business days of approval; the time for the amount to reflect in your account depends on your bank or payment provider.

sections.heading: 5. Cases not eligible for refund
body: Renewal charges after the 7-day window of the renewed term; accounts suspended or terminated for violating our Terms of Service; and charges for services already fully delivered at the time of the request.

sections.heading: 6. Governing law
body: This policy is governed by the laws of India. Any disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in India.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
body: Questions about this policy: support@smartshaadi.co.in.

meta.title: Cookie Policy — Smart Shaadi
meta.description: Which cookies Smart Shaadi uses: an essential session cookie for sign-in and privacy-respecting product analytics. No advertising cookies.

cookiePolicy.disclaimerBody: This document is a starter draft and not legal advice. It must be reviewed and finalised by qualified legal counsel before public launch.

sections.heading: 1. Essential cookies
body: Smart Shaadi sets one essential cookie: a secure, httpOnly session cookie that keeps you signed in (valid up to 30 days). It cannot be read by scripts in your browser and is required for the platform to work — blocking it will prevent sign-in.

sections.heading: 2. Analytics
body: We use PostHog product analytics to understand how the platform is used and to improve it. Analytics data is used internally only and is not sold.

sections.heading: 3. What we do not do
body: We do not use advertising cookies, cross-site trackers, or third-party ad networks, and we do not sell cookie-derived data.

sections.heading: 4. Managing cookies
body: You can clear or block cookies in your browser settings. Blocking the essential session cookie will sign you out and prevent login.

sections.heading: 5. Changes and contact
body: We will update this page if our cookie usage changes. Questions: support@smartshaadi.co.in.

hub.heroSubtitle: Assist family members with matchmaking and collaborate on their weddings — every action they didn't do themselves needs their approval.
hub.seekersEmptyTitle: You're not linked to anyone yet
hub.seekersEmptyDesc: Once a family member approves your link request, you can help them browse matches and draft interests on their behalf.
hub.pendingEmptyDesc: Drafted interests and messages you send on a seeker's behalf will wait here until they respond.
hub.collabEmptyDesc: Weddings you're invited to help plan will appear here with a direct link into the shared planner, once you're added as a collaborator.
hub.detailsEmptyDesc: This structured family bio applies to accounts with their own matchmaking profile.

parentMode.title: Parent mode
parentMode.subtitle: Browse matches and draft interests for family members you're linked to — nothing is sent until they approve it.
parentMode.assistEmptyTitle: You're not linked to anyone yet
parentMode.assistEmptyDesc: Linking is parent-initiated: send a link request to a family member's account, and once they approve it from their inbox, they'll appear here.
parentMode.consentNote: Every interest, message or profile edit you draft on behalf of a family member sits in their inbox for approval — you can never take an action they haven't consented to.
parentMode.childSubtitle: Permission tier: {tier}. Every action drafted here waits in {name}'s inbox for approval.
parentMode.noActionsDesc: Browse {name}'s curated matches and draft an interest — it'll show up here until they approve or decline it.

browse.subtitle: Curated matches for {name}. Draft an interest — they approve it from their inbox before anything is sent.
browse.cantBrowseDesc: You need an approved link with this family member, or their matches aren't ready yet.
browse.noCuratedDesc: No curated matches yet. Check back as their profile strengthens.

vendorUtilization.heading: Off-Season Opportunities

vendorUtilization.noOpportunitiesDescription: As you add more capacity windows marked as off-season, matching events will appear here.
vendorUtilization.rankedWindowsSubtitle: Listed by date, with highest capacity fit first.
vendorUtilization.devNote: Dev note: The /api/v1/vendors/utilization route is unmounted during Phase 5. It will return live data when the route is mounted in Phase 2. Window data is queried from vendor_capacity; event type matching from vendor_event_types.

adminAnalyticsForecast.heading: Platform Analytics
adminAnalyticsForecast.subtitle: 6-month demand and revenue forecasts.
adminAnalyticsForecast.demandSubtitle: Projected booking volume over the next 6 months with seasonal adjustment.
adminAnalyticsForecast.revenueSubtitle: Projected captured revenue with seasonal patterns accounted for.
adminAnalyticsForecast.seasonalityDescription: Demand and revenue patterns detect 12-month seasonality cycles. Peaks typically align with wedding seasons (Dec–Jan, May–Jun).
adminAnalyticsForecast.trendDescription: A moving average of recent months sets the baseline level; the 6-month projection applies seasonal indices to that level.
adminAnalyticsForecast.updateFrequencyDescription: Forecasts refresh as new booking and payment data arrives. Monthly review recommended for strategic planning.
adminAnalyticsForecast.errorLoading: Unable to load forecast data. Admin or Support role required, and at least one month of platform history.
adminAnalyticsForecast.noDataHint: Historical data will appear once records are available.

adminRetention.heading: Churn Recovery
adminRetention.subtitle: At-risk users the daily sweep flagged, and what happened after outreach.
adminRetention.noAttempts: No recovery attempts yet. The daily sweep records them here as it runs.

servicesLending.heading: Wedding financing
servicesLending.subtitle: Compare loan offers from RBI-regulated lenders for your wedding plans.

previewBanner.title: Not live yet — preview.
previewBanner.description: Wedding financing is shown for preview only and is not available until our RBI-compliant lending partner is live. No application is submitted and no data leaves Smart Shaadi.

disclosure.title: Smart Shaadi is a Loan Service Provider (LSP), not the lender.
disclosure.description: We only surface offers from RBI-regulated lenders. Loans are provided by the lender named on each offer.
disclosure.detail: Funds are disbursed directly to your bank account and repayments go directly to the lender. Smart Shaadi never handles your money.

servicesLending.successDescription: We've noted your consent. When our lending partner is live you'll be referred with a Key Fact Statement before any agreement.
servicesLending.noOffers: No offers to show right now.
servicesLending.consentText: I consent to Smart Shaadi sharing the details needed to refer me to the selected lender. I understand Smart Shaadi is an LSP, earns a referral fee from the lender, and never collects interest or handles my money.

servicesInsurance.heading: Insurance for your big day
servicesInsurance.subtitle: Compare cover from IRDAI-registered insurers — health, life, travel, and wedding-event protection.

previewBanner.title: Not live yet — preview.
previewBanner.description: Insurance is shown for preview only and is not available until our IRDAI-compliant partner is live. No application is submitted and no data leaves Smart Shaadi.

disclosure.title: Smart Shaadi refers you to IRDAI-registered insurers.
disclosure.description: Cover is provided by the insurer named on each quote — Smart Shaadi is not the insurer and earns a referral fee, never your premium.
disclosure.detail: We lead with standard health cover; life, travel, and wedding-event protection are also available.

servicesInsurance.successDescription: We've noted your consent. When our insurance partner is live you'll be referred to the insurer with full policy disclosures.
servicesInsurance.noQuotes: No quotes to show right now.
servicesInsurance.consentText: I consent to Smart Shaadi sharing the details needed to refer me to the selected insurer. I understand Smart Shaadi is a referrer, earns a referral fee, and does not collect my premium.

Promote "{title}" to a real partner?

This unlocks booking and payment for this package. Only do this once the venue is genuinely onboarded and the contact details and imagery have been replaced.

seedBanner.title: Placeholder inventory is live
seedBanner.body: {count, plural, one {# package is} other {# packages are}} seeded placeholder supply. They browse and render exactly like real listings, and they capture enquiries — but they cannot be booked or paid for. Promote one once its venue is genuinely onboarded.

divorceeOnboarding.headerSubtitleDivorce: Ready to meet someone who gets you.
divorceeOnboarding.step1DivorceeMessage: You're ready to find genuine connection. That's all that matters here.
divorceeOnboarding.step1WidowMessage: You're opening your heart again — that takes courage. Smart Shaadi celebrates that.

guna-milan.disclaimer_text: This analysis is based on classical Vedic astrology principles. It represents traditional guidance and should not be considered a definitive prediction of relationship outcomes. Every relationship's success depends on mutual care, communication, and commitment from both partners. For concerns about specific doshas, please consult a qualified Vedic astrologer.
